description: Grouped bar chart comparing two percentages for each of the eight SBE regions in 2025 — 4-year graduation rate (blue) and test proficiency (orange). Graduation rates run in the high 80s to low 90s while proficiency runs from the high 40s to high 50s; Western has the top graduation rate at 91.6 percent.

title.text: Graduation rate vs. test proficiency by region, 2025
title.subtitle: Two measures per region, bars side by side. Both are percentages, but neither is 'good' vs 'bad' — so the colors are categorical, not valenced.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI public accountability data (4-year cohort graduation rate; GLP test proficiency), 2025. Style-guide demo.
